list.name: location
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT location FROM collectors ORDER BY location;

list.name: collector
list.query: SELECT name FROM collectors WHERE location IN ($location) ORDER BY name;

list.name: region
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT target_region FROM ping_results ORDER BY target_region;

list.name: target
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT target_label FROM ping_results WHERE target_region IN ($region) ORDER BY target_label;
list.label: Target

targets.rawSql: SELECT target_region AS "Region", round(avg(rtt_avg)::numeric, 1) AS "Avg RTT (ms)" FROM ping_results WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at) AND collector_id IN (SELECT id FROM collectors WHERE name IN ($collector) AND location IN ($location)) AND target_region IN ($region) AND target_label IN ($target) AND rtt_avg IS NOT NULL GROUP BY target_region ORDER BY "Avg RTT (ms)" DESC;

SELECT avg(packet_loss) AS "Avg Loss" FROM ping_results WHERE created_at > now() - interval '1 hour' AND collector_id IN (SELECT id FROM collectors WHERE name IN ($collector) AND location IN ($location)) AND target_region IN ($region) AND target_label IN ($target);
SELECT download_mbps AS "Download" FROM speed_results WHERE collector_id IN (SELECT id FROM collectors WHERE name IN ($collector) AND location IN ($location)) ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1;
SELECT upload_mbps AS "Upload" FROM speed_results WHERE collector_id IN (SELECT id FROM collectors WHERE name IN ($collector) AND location IN ($location)) ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1;

SELECT created_at AS "time", rtt_avg AS "value", target_label || ' (' || target_region || ')' AS "metric" FROM ping_results WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at) AND collector_id IN (SELECT id FROM collectors WHERE name IN ($collector) AND location IN ($location)) AND target_region IN ($region) AND target_label IN ($target) AND rtt_avg IS NOT NULL ORDER BY created_at;

SELECT created_at AS "time", packet_loss AS "value", target_label || ' (' || target_region || ')' AS "metric" FROM ping_results WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at) AND collector_id IN (SELECT id FROM collectors WHERE name IN ($collector) AND location IN ($location)) AND target_region IN ($region) AND target_label IN ($target) ORDER BY created_at;

SELECT created_at AS "time", download_mbps AS "Download (Mbps)" FROM speed_results WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at) AND collector_id IN (SELECT id FROM collectors WHERE name IN ($collector) AND location IN ($location)) ORDER BY created_at;

SELECT created_at AS "time", upload_mbps AS "Upload (Mbps)" FROM speed_results WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at) AND collector_id IN (SELECT id FROM collectors WHERE name IN ($collector) AND location IN ($location)) ORDER BY created_at;

panels.title: Traceroute — Per-Hop Latency Breakdown
panels.description: Each segment shows the incremental RTT added by that hop. Total bar length ≈ end-to-end RTT.

targets.rawSql: WITH latest AS ( SELECT target_host, max(created_at) AS ts FROM traceroute_results WHERE collector_id IN (SELECT id FROM collectors WHERE name IN ($collector) AND location IN ($location)) AND target_region IN ($region) AND target_label IN ($target) GROUP BY target_host ), hops AS ( SELECT t.target_label, t.hop_number, t.rtt_avg, COALESCE(LAG(t.rtt_avg) OVER (PARTITION BY t.target_label ORDER BY t.hop_number), 0) AS prev_rtt FROM traceroute_results t JOIN latest l ON t.target_host = l.target_host AND t.created_at = l.ts WHERE t.collector_id IN (SELECT id FROM collectors WHERE name IN ($collector) AND location IN ($location)) AND t.target_region IN ($region) AND t.target_label IN ($target) AND t.rtt_avg IS NOT NULL ) SELECT target_label AS "Target", 'Hop ' || lpad(hop_number::text, 2, '0') AS "Hop", round(GREATEST(rtt_avg - prev_rtt, 0)::numeric, 1) AS "Added RTT (ms)" FROM hops ORDER BY target_label, hop_number;
